# Chapter 11: Bioinformatics: sequence, structure, omics  (~100 pp)
- 11.1 Sequence data: alphabets, alignment, search (12) · 11.2 Sequence-to-structure: prediction, AlphaFold and beyond (15) · 11.3 Genomics and variant calling (12) · 11.4 Transcriptomics and single-cell RNA-seq (12) · 11.5 Proteomics, metabolomics, lipidomics, fluxomics (15) · 11.6 Phylogenetics and evolutionary engineering (10) · 11.7 ML for biology: graph networks, foundation models (12) · 11.8 Failure section: data leakage in biological ML, batch effects, overfit-to-cohort (12)

**Archetype**: information, scaling, uncertainty. **Project**: align two bacterial genomes; identify variants and annotate functions. **Exercises**: 30.
